market_regime.interpretation: Levels are less reliable. Gamma flip zone is a transition area. Expect larger swings and whipsaws. Use caution.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: ELEVATED: Spot at gamma flip with negative net GEX (-2.11B). 0DTE positive GEX provides short-term stability, but Weekly/Monthly negative GEX amplifies downside risk. Watch for directional breakout.
outlook.summary: Critical positioning at 646.62 gamma flip. Extreme PCR (>2.0 across all expiries) and bearish skew confirm heavy put hedging. 0DTE Max Pain at 645 acts as magnet. Bulls need reclaim of 650 call wall; bears target 630 confluence support. Pin risk active near spot.

levels.motivazione: Massive put OI confluence: Weekly 144,699 + Monthly 116,292. Structural institutional support zone with extreme put hedging concentration.
0DTE Max Pain level 0.3% below spot. MM target for option value minimization. High OI concentration (23,353 PUT + 14,629 CALL) creates pinning behavior.
0DTE gamma flip at spot (647.05). Critical equilibrium point where dealer gamma shifts sign. High probability of directional acceleration on breach.
0DTE call wall with 17,742 OI. Primary resistance with 24,482 put OI creating friction. Break above targets 660 weekly call wall.
0DTE put wall with 37,373 OI. Deep support level. Weekly (9,490) and Monthly (52,091) put concentration confirms structural importance.
Extreme 0DTE volume (375,749 PUT + 157,411 CALL). High friction zone with dealer delta hedging activity. Monthly put OI (101,119) adds confluence.
Weekly call wall (16,352 OI) with put OI (18,673) creating resistance. Secondary target if 650 breaks. Monthly confluence (28,598 PUT + 10,750 CALL).

market_regime.interpretation: Levels are less reliable. Gamma flip zone is a transition area. Expect larger swings and whipsaws. Use caution.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed by positive 0DTE GEX, but risk of acceleration below 574
outlook.summary: Spot is pinned at the 0DTE Gamma Flip (574). While positive 0DTE GEX suggests stability, the extreme bearish skew and heavy Put OI above spot (580) create a structural ceiling. Dealers are likely hedged long below 574, but will sell into rallies.

levels.motivazione: Critical 0DTE inflection point. Spot trading just below indicates dealers are in short gamma territory, amplifying downside moves. Break above stabilizes market.
Massive Monthly Put Wall (37k OI) combined with high 0DTE volume (125k+ Call Vol). Dealers defend this level aggressively against further drops.
Significant Put OI in Weekly (13k) and Monthly (30k) above spot. Dealers short these puts must sell stock as price rises, creating strong resistance.
0DTE Max Pain level. With high bearish skew and negative longer-term GEX, price is magnetized towards this level to inflict maximum option pain.
Dominant Monthly Call OI (39k) creates a hard ceiling. With bearish skew, upside calls are cheap, but dealers will aggressively sell rallies here.

market_regime.interpretation: Put walls are temporary support (breakdown likely). Call walls are strong resistance. Gamma flip acts as dynamic resistance.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: ELEVATED: Negative GEX across 0DTE and MONTHLY amplifies volatility. Dealers short gamma will accelerate moves through support levels. Smirk skew (2.01) confirms fear pricing.
outlook.summary: Spot 23539 sits precariously above WEEKLY put wall at 23400 with 0DTE friction at 23500-23520. Negative total GEX (-0.51B) creates unstable conditions. Max Pain 23880 provides upside magnet. Watch 23400 support closely - breakdown triggers dealer selling cascade.

levels.motivazione: Major resistance: 0DTE 359 PUT OI + 531 CALL OI (WEEKLY highest) + 97 CALL OI (MONTHLY). Confluence across all expiries. Near MONTHLY max pain 24300.
Critical support: WEEKLY 478 PUT OI + MONTHLY 83 PUT OI. WEEKLY max pain. Only 139 pts below spot - immediate test likely. Negative GEX amplifies importance.
0DTE max pain 341 pts above spot. Dealer target. Negative GEX environment increases magnetic pull as dealers hedge toward pain minimization.
High 0DTE call concentration (134+122+159 OI at 23500-23520). VOL/OI >1.5 indicates heavy intraday activity. Creates resistance near spot.
Major 0DTE support: 563 PUT OI (highest) + 103 CALL OI. Volume 547+63 indicates active positioning. Secondary structural support if 23400 fails.
MONTHLY 412 CALL OI + WEEKLY 471 CALL OI. Secondary resistance cluster near max pain zone. Confluence validates upside cap.
Far below spot but marks systemic risk zone. If reached, indicates complete structural breakdown. Negative GEX concentration point.
